panels.title: DLI Today

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), dli_today AS v FROM climate WHERE dli_today IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Accumulated Daily Light Integral from indoor lux sensor

panels.title: Indoor Lux

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), lux AS v FROM climate WHERE lux IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current indoor light level from ESP32 ADC

panels.title: Outdoor Lux

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux AS v FROM climate WHERE outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Tempest weather station illuminance

panels.title: Transmission

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), transmission_pct AS v FROM v_light_transmission ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Indoor lux / outdoor lux × 100

panels.title: Sun Altitude

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), solar_altitude_deg AS v FROM climate WHERE solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Sun angle above horizon (NOAA algorithm)

panels.title: Est. PPFD

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), lux * 0.0185 AS v FROM climate WHERE lux IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Indoor lux × 0.0185 (sunlight spectrum conversion)

panels.title: Grow Light

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS v FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_main' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Grow light main relay state

panels.title: GL Hours

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_grow_light_min)/60.0, 1) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Total grow light runtime in selected period

panels.title: Indoor Lux, Outdoor Lux & Solar Altitude
panels.description: Indoor light (sensor), outdoor light (Tempest), and sun angle on one chart. Shows how sun position drives outdoor light, and how glazing transmission reduces it to indoor levels.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), lux AS "Indoor Lux"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND lux IS NOT NULL AND lux > 0
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux AS "Outdoor Lux"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_lux > 0
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), solar_altitude_deg AS "Sun Altitude"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL AND solar_altitude_deg > -5
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: DLI Accumulation — Sensor vs Corrected vs Target
panels.description: Sensor DLI (raw LDR), estimated actual plant DLI (3.5x correction + grow light), and daily target line.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), dli_today AS "Sensor DLI" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dli_today IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), estimated_plant_dli AS "Estimated Plant DLI" FROM v_estimated_plant_dli WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) ORDER BY date
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), 14.0 AS "Target (14 mol)" FROM v_estimated_plant_dli WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) ORDER BY date

panels.title: Outdoor Light (Lux, Irradiance, UV)
panels.description: Tempest weather station outdoor light measurements

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_lux AS "Outdoor Lux"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_lux IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Solar Irradiance (W/m²)"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), uv_index AS "UV Index"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND uv_index IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Solar Position (Altitude & Azimuth)
panels.description: Sun angle and compass bearing. Altitude: 0°=horizon, 90°=zenith, negative=night. Azimuth: 0°=N, 90°=E, 180°=S, 270°=W.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_altitude_deg AS "Altitude"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), solar_azimuth_deg AS "Azimuth"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_azimuth_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Light Transmission (%)
panels.description: Indoor lux / outdoor lux × 100. Shows how much outdoor light reaches the sensor through glazing, structure, and obstructions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), transmission_pct AS "Transmission %"
FROM v_light_transmission
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Solar Altitude vs Indoor Lux
panels.description: Correlation between sun angle and indoor light. Shows how glazing angle affects transmission at different sun positions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_altitude_deg AS "Sun Altitude"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), lux AS "Indoor Lux"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND lux IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Grow Light State

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Grow Light Main"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_main' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Grow Light Grow"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_grow' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows grow light state or runtime behavior.

panels.title: Light Decision Context
panels.description: Factors affecting grow light decisions: light state, occupancy, sun position

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Grow Light"
FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_main' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Occupancy"
FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'occupancy' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN solar_altitude_deg > 0 THEN 'Day' ELSE 'Night' END AS "Sun"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_altitude_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Daily DLI (Final)
panels.description: Maximum DLI reached each day — the final daily light integral

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), dli_final AS "Daily DLI"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND dli_final IS NOT NULL AND dli_final > 0
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Daily Grow Light Runtime
panels.description: Hours of grow light operation per day from daily_summary

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), runtime_grow_light_min / 60.0 AS "Grow Light Hours"
FROM daily_summary
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours')) AND runtime_grow_light_min > 0
ORDER BY date

panels.title: Forecast vs Actual Solar Radiation
panels.description: Open-Meteo 48h forecast compared to actual Tempest irradiance readings

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), solar_w_m2 AS "Forecast (W/m²)"
FROM weather_forecast
WHERE ts >= now() AND ts <= now() + interval '48 hours'
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), solar_irradiance_w_m2 AS "Actual (W/m²)"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT date_trunc('day', ts) AS time, max(dli_today) AS "Sensor DLI" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '90 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', ts) AS time, max(dli_today) * 3.2 AS "Estimated Actual DLI" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '90 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', ts) AS time, 14.0 AS "Target DLI" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '90 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily DLI — Sensor vs Estimated Actual vs Target
panels.description: Shows how badly the current lux sensor underreports actual plant light, relative to a corrected estimate and the target DLI line.
